memory_fit: PASS — compiles + executes end-to-end, no OOM
verdict: Shard spec is CORRECT & complete. Catastrophic PCC is caused by SHARDED ATTENTION under SPMD, not the partition_spec. Not a loader-fixable bug — needs a compiler/SPMD fix for head-sharded repeat_kv + M-RoPE reshapes, OR ship MLP-only TP (~0.96).

experiments.spec: attention q/k/v/o REPLICATED; only MLP gate/up/down sharded (env HUNYUAN_TE_MLP_ONLY=1)
experiments.interpretation: PCC recovers from 0.277 -> 0.964 -> attention sharding is the dominant corruption; MLP sharding is correct.

spec_validation: shard_text_encoder_specs is byte-for-byte identical to the known-good llama/causal_lm and qwen_3/causal_lm Megatron specs. Divisibility OK at 4-way: 28 q heads/4=7, 4 kv heads/4=1, hidden 3584/4=896, intermediate 18944/4=4736. GQA groups align contiguously (chip i: q heads 7i..7i+6 + kv head i).

root_cause.summary: torch-xla/Shardy mispropagates sharding through two attention reshapes on the head-sharded q/k tensors.

ops.issue: expand+reshape [bs,4,seq,d]->[bs,28,seq,d] on the SPMD-sharded kv-head dim; sharding not tracked through expand/merge.
M-RoPE split/cat on head_dim with mrope_section [16,24,24]; cos/sin broadcast over sharded head dim.

root_cause.why_not_llama: llama/qwen3 references use standard RoPE (rope_scaling=None) and pass with the identical spec. This model adds M-RoPE (mrope_section [16,24,24]) + GQA — the qwen2_5_vl-specific attention path.

residual_gap: Even MLP-only lands at 0.9637 < 0.99. Remaining ~0.026 is device fp32 matmul/all-reduce numerics (down_proj cross-shard sum) + baseline device PCC of the replicated attention stack — an op-level/runtime-numeric issue, NOT shard spec.

recommendations.action: File torch-xla/tt-mlir SPMD issue: head-sharded repeat_kv (expand+reshape) + M-RoPE reshape mispropagation for qwen2_5_vl. Blocks correct 4-way attention TP.

Replicate q/k/v/o, shard MLP only (HUNYUAN_TE_MLP_ONLY=1). Fits memory (~9 GiB/chip fp32). Currently 0.9637 — still under 0.99 bar; needs the residual numeric gap closed (runtime-failure-debugger, op-level PCC) before it passes.
weight_fit: text_encoder fits single-chip on p150 (Blackhole, 32 GiB) at fp32/bf16 — sidesteps all TP sharding. Original eligible_arch. Test already skips TP on that path (test_text_encoder).

loader_change: Added env-gated DIAGNOSTIC branch HUNYUAN_TE_MLP_ONLY in shard_text_encoder_specs (default off = original full Megatron spec). Reversible; no change to default behavior.
